items.title: Jaylen Brown Is the New NBA's First True Casualty

items.title: Pacers notebook: Kelly Oubre Jr. addition, Summer League roster set, and Jay Huff joins Team USA

Nothing was more surprising than the Celtics moving Jaylen Brown to the 76ers on the first full day of free…
